title: isodon longitubus var. contractus
intro: Isodon longitubus var. contractus, also known as a type of perennial plant, is a variety of Isodon longitubus that belongs to the Lamiaceae family, commonly found in the mountainous regions of China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems due to its antiviral and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Isodon longitubus var. contractus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Isodon longitubus var. contractus include decoctions, infusions, and dried extracts, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, and capsules for medicinal purposes.
